title: Utterance addressee gate
summary: Required when a paired battery shows an addressed floor bid the agent missed AND a false trigger on speech that was NOT addressed to the agent (an addressee the agent should have filtered before its turn-taking logic ever saw a floor-take signal). This capability is explicitly NOT about addressed backchannels: an addressed "mhm" is in scope, not this gate. As of this Atlas build, the bundled share-safe funnel-demo battery contains no cleared paired fixture with an explicit non-addressed-speech label, so no record in this Atlas is indexed under this capability yet (0 of 2 bundled records qualify) -- see /failures/patterns/side-speech-triggered-agent/ for the open, unindexed pattern page and what evidence would clear it.
